stemHtml: Instrument Flight Rules – minimum level – Over high terrain or mountainous areas, where no minimum flight altitude has been established, flights under IFR shall be flown at a level which is at least…

options.a: 2000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 km of the estimated position of the aircraft.
options.b: 1000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 km of the estimated position of the aircraft.
options.c: 2000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 NM of the estimated position of the aircraft.
options.d: 1000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 NM of the estimated position of the aircraft.
